title: Zone-based budgets and REBT Normativa page
description: Reorganize budget form by zones/rooms and create REBT normativa page with keyword-based assistant
acceptance_criteria: Budget form organized by collapsible zones with subtotals
Predefined zones list with custom zone support
Budget detail view groups items by zone
Zone stored as [ZONA] prefix in description field
New /normativa page with REBT knowledge base
Reference tables for circuits, cable sections, circuit breakers
